panelHint: Click "⚡ Capability" to see what MegaForm can do with a table — and to build a form from it, by machine or with AI. "+ DataGrid" inserts a self-configured Subform, and column chips can be dragged onto the canvas as input fields.
selectedHint: Tables you have inserted are listed here. Click × to remove.
buttonProbeTitle: Probe capability: key, permissions, indexes, required columns — what MegaForm can do with this table
buttonAddAiFormTitle: Add this table to the form's working set. AI will only be invoked when you click 'Build with AI' on the strip below.
buttonBuildWithAiTitle: Send the picked tables to the AI assistant and let it propose input fields based on each table's columns.
buttonClearSelectedTitle: Remove all tables from the working set.
errorConnectionHint: Check that DashboardDatabase connection is configured in Host Settings → MegaForm.
